items.question: How much does development cost?
items.answer: The cost depends on the project complexity. We evaluate each project individually after a briefing. Contact us for a free estimate.

items.question: What are the development timelines?
items.answer: Landing page — from 1 week. Web app — from 4 weeks. Telegram bot — from 2 weeks. Exact timelines are discussed after briefing.

items.question: How do we get started?
items.answer: Submit a request via the form or contact us directly. We'll conduct a free briefing, propose a solution and provide an estimate.

items.question: What technologies do you use?
items.answer: Python, Django, FastAPI, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, PostgreSQL, Telegram Bot API, Kaspi API.

items.question: Do you provide post-launch support?
items.answer: Yes, we provide support and improvements after project launch. Terms are discussed individually.
